fields.name: max_stack
fields.comment: Stack limit; blank cells use the default

fields.name: daily_bonus_items
fields.comment: Fixed-length array parsed from one cell

fields.name: maintenance
fields.comment: Optional derived struct copied from a child row

fields.name: root_condition
fields.comment: Single union value derived from a tagged_columns child row

fields.name: actions
fields.comment: Non-JSON list<union<RewardAction>> assembled from child rows

fields.name: budget
fields.comment: Nested tuple, tuple_list, split, and map parsers in one cell

fields.name: conditions
fields.comment: A derived list of union values; each child row is edited without JSON
